title: KDSS Neutralization
symptoms: System in fail-safe / reduced suspension articulation
After KDSS cylinder replacement or accumulator service
KDSS pressure sensor out of range
prerequisites: KDSS fluid reservoir at MIN mark or above
No simultaneous active faults in ABS/VSC system
warnings: Do not run with fluid below MIN — pump damage may result
Engine must be running to provide power to hydraulic pump
Vehicle must remain stationary throughout procedure
If neutralization fails after 90 seconds, inspect for hydraulic line disconnection or severe air ingestion

steps.technical_detail: Verify KDSS ECU communication (TesterPresent 0x3E 0x80), read baseline hydraulic pressures, confirm fluid level adequate.
steps.caution: Abort if front AND rear pressure both read near zero — indicates missing fluid or disconnected sensor

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x03. Required to unlock diagnostic routines and active tests not available in default OBD2 session.
steps.caution: If rejected, verify ignition state and ECU communication

steps.technical_detail: Read all KDSS live data DIDs to establish baseline: front pressure (0x1A01), rear pressure (0x1A02), pump status (0x1A03), accumulator (0x1A09), mode (0x1A0A), all 4 valves (0x1A04-0x1A07).
UDS Service 0x14 with group 0xFFFFFF clears all diagnostic groups from KDSS ECU. Non-fatal if this fails — procedure continues.
steps.caution: If root cause (air in system) not fixed, DTCs will return after key cycle

steps.technical_detail: UDS RoutineControl (0x31) start (0x01) for Routine ID 0x0210. ECU sequence: (1) all 4 KDSS solenoid valves open (cross-connected), (2) hydraulic pump energizes at ~85% PWM duty, (3) fluid circulates pushing trapped air toward reservoir, (4) ECU monitors pressure rise expecting >=6 MPa within 60s, (5) when pressure stabilizes ECU closes valves and shuts pump.
steps.caution: Status byte 0x00 = started successfully. 0x7F NRC response = ECU rejected — check fluid level and active fault conditions

steps.technical_detail: Poll Routine Results every 2 seconds using 0x31 0x03. Keep session alive with TesterPresent (0x3E 0x80). Monitor: result_status (0x00=running, 0x01=success, 0x02=fault), ECU progress %, front/rear pressures rising. Timeout: 90 seconds. NRC 0x78 (responsePending) during polling is normal.
steps.caution: If pump runs >90s without completion: severe air ingestion or hydraulic line damage suspected

steps.technical_detail: Read post-procedure status. Success criteria: front pressure >=6.0 MPa, rear pressure >=6.0 MPa, pump status Off (0), KDSS mode Normal (0), no active DTCs.
steps.caution: If pressures still below 6.0 MPa after successful pump run, check for hydraulic leak

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x01 returns ECU to default session.
steps.caution: Turn ignition OFF for 10 seconds then restart engine. Verify KDSS warning lamp extinguished on dashboard.

did_map.0x1A08: KDSS Pump Motor Duty Cycle (%, u8, /2.55)

outcome_summary: Purges air from KDSS hydraulic circuit by running pump at ~85% PWM. Restores front and rear circuit pressure to >=6.0 MPa nominal operating range. Clears C1831-C1840 fault codes.
